portfolio which has crashed twice since

gold Bitcoin, this is where I really
think KISS shines because you know what
in my opinion I think it's pretty easy
to to beat the 6040 portfolio. Uh what
it's not easy to beat is a naked long
portfolio of risk assets that is fully
invested at all times. This is why most
fund managers underperform the the the
the the index. It's because they they
have cash and they make decisions. The
index has a survivorship bias and it has
no cash. Those are two those are four
reasons why you it's very difficult to
beat the index. And so, you know, if
you're having if you're making any risk
management decisions, you're not going
to have a 100 plus% upside capture ratio
relative to the assets. You know, the
kiss is an unlevered strategy. So, it's
never going to have a more than 100%
upside capture ratio to a 6010 stocks go
uh Bitcoin portfolio. But what it does
have is an 89% upside capture ratio and
a 49% downside capture ratio. So you're
getting 90% of the return you would get
if you were naked long 603010 stocks
gold Bitcoin at all times but you're
only getting half of the downside. And
so to me I think that's a phenomenal
fantastic trade-off. If you look at the
max draw down of of of 6010 stocks go
Bitcoin if minus 25% that it's more than
double the max draw down of KISS. And by
